title: Project Manager – Aerospace Programmes (Contract, Bristol)
description_raw: Matchtech are looking for a Project Manager to join a Bristol aerospace site on a 12-month contract outside IR35. Managing an aerostructures modification programme for a Tier-1 civil aviation manufacturer. Mechanical/structural engineering background preferred. Rate: £630–£660/day. Start: 3 August 2026. APM/Prince2. AS9100 environment.
